title: 1.6m x 10m Window Insulation Kit, Plastic Clear Film, Tear Resistant Heat Shrink Window Film with Double-Side Tape for Winterizing and Keeping Cold Out
features: Energy Savings – This window insulation kit keeps cold air out and warm air in during winter, Minimizes condensation and prevents frost buildup,Saves energy and reduces heating costs
Durable Plastic Material – Made from high quality Plastic, this window film is tear-resistant, windproof, It shrinks smoothly with a hair dryer, creating a flat, wrinkle-free surface

Large Window Insulation film– Includes 1.6m x10m clear film and 2 roll 2cm x 20m of double-sided tape, sufficient for 10 standard 3 x 5 ft windows. The tape is wide for a secure hold and leaves no residue upon removal
Simple Installation – Easy to operate with the instructions, Ensure the window frame is clean and dry for the best adhesion before installation. The transparent film preserves your view outside

Versatile Use – This winter insulation film kit fits a variety of window types, including aluminum frames, casement windows, attic fan shades, and blinds. Note: Ensure you measure your windows accurately before purchasing
